sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشُّعَرَاءُ الْقُدَمَاءُ يَكْتُبُونَ قَصَائِدَ جَمِيلَةً عَنِ الصَّحْرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Stari pjesnici su pisali lijepe kaside o pustinji.
sentences.translationEn: Ancient poets used to write beautiful poems about the desert.

sentences.arabic: هُمْ يَصِفُونَ الْجِمَالَ وَالْخِيَامَ وَالنُّجُومَ فِي اللَّيْلِ.
sentences.translation: Opisivali su deve, šatore i zvijezde u noći.
sentences.translationEn: They described camels, tents, and the stars at night.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشِّعْرُ هُوَ دِيوَانَ الْعَرَبِ وَتَارِيخَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Poezija je bila registar Arapa i njihova historija.
sentences.translationEn: Poetry was the record and history of the Arabs.

sentences.arabic: الْيَوْمَ، نَحْنُ نَقْرَأُ هَذِهِ الْأَشْعَارَ لِنَتَعَلَّمَ اللُّغَةَ الْفَصِيحَةَ.
sentences.translation: Danas čitamo ove pjesme kako bismo naučili rječit jezik.
sentences.translationEn: Today, we read these poems to learn the eloquent language.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْقَصَائِدُ تُعَبِّرُ عَنِ الْكَرَمِ وَالشَّجَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove kaside izražavaju plemenitost i hrabrost.
sentences.translationEn: These poems express generosity and courage.
